Shell.tagline: Volunteer, internship and Spanish experiences with real impact.
Shell.footer: Bilingual architectural base prepared to grow the MVP inside a single Next.js application.

NotFound.title: Page not found
NotFound.description: The requested route does not exist or has not been implemented in the MVP yet.

home.title: We connect people with intercultural programs in Costa Rica.
home.description: This base introduces the organization, its programs and the initial funnel to attract international volunteers from a single fullstack application.
home.highlightOne: Clear promotion of volunteering, internships and Spanish classes.
home.highlightTwo: Architecture ready for forms, email and database integration.
home.highlightThree: Public routing cleanly separated from the admin panel.

about.title: About Pura Vida Interculturas
about.description: Institutional space to communicate purpose, local experience and the international value proposition of the organization.
about.highlightOne: Content structure aimed at strengthening international visibility.
about.highlightTwo: Ready for SEO, bilingual content and institutional storytelling.
about.highlightThree: Ideal for mission, vision, history and team content in upcoming iterations.

programs.title: Available programs
programs.description: Initial listing for volunteering, internships and Spanish classes with room for filters and dynamic publishing.
programs.highlightOne: Prepared for categories, publication status and featured programs.
programs.highlightTwo: Compatible with per-program slugs and SEO metadata.
programs.highlightThree: Ready to connect to MongoDB once persistence is implemented.

programDetail.title: Program detail view
programDetail.description: Reserved screen to show full description, location, duration, requirements and inclusions for each program.
programDetail.highlightOne: The dynamic URL uses a slug for future indexable pages.
programDetail.highlightTwo: It will consume bilingual content from translations.es and translations.en.
programDetail.highlightThree: This is the natural handoff point to the application CTA.

apply.title: Apply to a program
apply.description: Prepared screen for the open MVP application form with privacy consent and only the minimum required data.
apply.highlightOne: Later it will capture full name, email, country, start date and message.
apply.highlightTwo: The architecture already expects centralized client/server validation.
apply.highlightThree: After submission, the flow leads to a dedicated success page.

applySuccess.title: Application received
applySuccess.description: Success page meant to acknowledge the submission and prepare future automated email confirmations.
applySuccess.highlightOne: Builds trust immediately after form submission.
applySuccess.highlightTwo: Useful later as an analytics conversion touchpoint.
applySuccess.highlightThree: Can evolve into personalized next-step guidance.

impact.title: Impact and resource allocation
impact.description: Section intended to communicate outcomes, resource use and visual representation of institutional impact.
impact.highlightOne: Aligned with the requirement to display impact or resource distribution.
impact.highlightTwo: Prepared for future charts powered by Recharts.
impact.highlightThree: Supports trust for an international audience.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Screen to centralize communication channels, location details and future inbound contact messages.
contact.highlightOne: Can evolve into a contact form and richer institutional data.
contact.highlightTwo: Keeps the funnel open without requiring user accounts.
contact.highlightThree: Helps resolve questions before somebody starts an application.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.description: Initial base to document explicit consent, minimum data handling and compliance around the application flow.
privacy.highlightOne: Essential for the consent required in the application form.
privacy.highlightTwo: Acts as the anchor for future privacy versioning.
privacy.highlightThree: Will connect to validation and consent tracking in applications.

ProgramsUi.empty: There are no published programs yet. The admin catalog is already prepared for the next iteration.
